caption: A handheld camera pans across an open-concept living area and kitchen. The sequence begins with a partial view of a dark wooden door on the left, revealing a living room with a brown leather sofa, a red patterned rug, and a window with beige curtains. A white counter separates the living area from the kitchen. As the camera moves, it reveals more of the kitchen space, including dark brown cabinetry, white countertops, a sink, and a stainless steel ventilation hood over a stovetop. The lighting is provided by recessed ceiling lights and a central chandelier. The flooring is a light-colored polished tile that reflects the overhead lights. No people are present in the scene, and there is no on-screen text or logos visible. The camera movement transitions from focusing on the living room to capturing the full layout of the integrated kitchen and lounge.
